symptoms: high vibration, high rpm, rising temperature
resolution: replaced bearing, realigned shaft, verified vibration levels

symptoms: high temperature, high current, normal vibration
root_cause: blocked cooling vents and motor overload
resolution: cleaned vents, reduced load, restored normal temperature

symptoms: low voltage, high current, unstable rpm
root_cause: voltage instability and motor winding stress
resolution: inspected wiring, stabilized supply, tested motor windings

symptoms: high pressure, high temperature, reduced flow
resolution: cleared blockage, inspected valves, normalized pressure
